overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza with neon-lit skyscrapers, outdoor dining areas, and digital billboards. The scene features wet reflective pavement, vibrant pink and cyan neon lighting, and various NPCs sitting at outdoor tables. The footage is clearly from a video game engine, showcasing a dense urban commercial district with a mix of open plazas and covered walkways.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide-open futuristic plaza at night, surrounded by towering skyscrapers with cyan neon lights. Large digital billboards illuminate the right side while a pedestrian sits on a yellow bench. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights as the camera walks forward toward a distant dining area.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered outdoor dining plaza with wet reflective pavement. Pink neon food stalls and vending machines with red signage line the path while NPCs sit at illuminated tables. The Cirrus building sign becomes visible on the left as the skyscraper cluster shifts to the right.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a vibrant pink neon bar with traditional Japanese paper lanterns hanging above. The bartender NPC works behind the counter as the camera slows to observe, then turns right to exit. The outdoor dining tables shift to the right while the food stall recedes into the left background.

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a covered walkway with the Cirrus bar entrance on the left and digital advertising screens on the right. Potted palm trees with integrated lighting line the path while NPCs sit at outdoor tables. The lighting shifts to a mix of neon and warm artificial light as the camera progresses deeper into the sheltered corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a futuristic nighttime plaza that transitions from a wide-open urban expanse into a dense, neon-lit dining district. It begins in a vast open area surrounded by towering skyscrapers with cyan neon lights, where large digital billboards cast a glow over a pedestrian resting on a yellow bench. As the camera advances across the wet, reflective pavement, the open space narrows and shifts toward a semi-covered outdoor dining plaza. The scene then expands to reveal pink neon food stalls and red vending machines lining the path, with NPCs seated at illuminated tables. Finally, the perspective glides past the Cirrus building sign on the left as the cluster of skyscrapers recedes toward the right.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open-air neon bar toward the sheltered depths of a futuristic covered walkway. It begins by approaching a vibrant pink neon bar adorned with traditional Japanese paper lanterns, slowing briefly to observe a bartender behind the counter. As the camera turns right to exit the area, the outdoor dining tables shift across the frame while the food stall recedes into the left background. The scene then transitions into a covered corridor, passing the Cirrus bar entrance on the left and digital advertising screens on the right. Finally, the camera progresses deeper into the sheltered path, lined with integrated lighting in potted palm trees, as the atmosphere shifts from open neon brilliance to a mix of warm artificial light.
